metadata.description: Sulis AI plugin marketplace — methodology studios, requirements analysis, facilitation, context cartography, right-sized architecture, disciplined change primitives, deterministic code intelligence, founder coordination, and autonomous Work Package execution end-to-end. v1.15.1 ships sulis-execution v0.10.7 — wpx-pipeline now resolves the Step 10a health check path correctly. Auto-detects from --smoke-cmd's URL (the smoke-test command typically already encodes the right path like /health); --health-path flag for explicit override; falls back to / for backward compatibility. Fixes the production bug where APIs whose root returns 404 by design produced spurious 10-minute hangs followed by health_status: unhealthy BLOCKERs on every WP since v0.10.4. Three regression tests pinned (46 tests total, up from 43). All v1.15.0 Founder English capabilities preserved. Composes with AAF-01..09, CP-01..05, FE-01..FE-10, GIT-01..GIT-11, EL-01..EL-08.

plugins.name: srd
plugins.description: Requirements Analyst — facilitates building Software Requirements Documents backed by UML artifacts through guided conversation. Includes intent triage, disambiguation sweep, and adversarial sweep phases; reads .context/{project}/INDEX.md from sulis-context to apply Respect-Don't-Restate; hands architecture work over to SEA. v1.19.0: publishes Founder English (FE-01..FE-10) at plugins/srd/references/founder-english.md — marketplace-wide standard governing voice, vocabulary, and pre-emission self-check for every user-facing agent. Promoted from concierge-only founder-english.md; expanded with FE-01..FE-05 voice principles (outcomes-first, concrete-over-abstract, confident-without-jargon, scannable, read-aloud), FE-06 five-point check (chat + artifact writes), FE-09 no-mechanism-narration, FE-10 composition with AAF + CP. Anchored on two production concierge failures. The requirements-analyst agent's 'Plain English First' rule now applies across every phase (was Phase 1-2 only).

plugins.name: sulis-context
plugins.description: Context Cartographer — discovers existing architecture documentation, ADRs, conventions, and standards in a project; produces .context/{project}/INDEX.md so downstream plugins (SRD, SEA, sulis-security) respect prior decisions instead of restating them. Folder-structure-agnostic; works on any project shape.

plugins.name: sulis-strategy
plugins.description: Business strategy studio for the Outcome-First Methodology. Provides vision, strategy, principles, commercial, GTM, and roadmap skills for strategic foundation work. v1.3.2: cites Founder English (FE-01..FE-10) at plugins/srd/references/founder-english.md — every founder-facing chat message AND founder-readable artifact write passes the FE-06 five-point check (strip internal IDs, translate filenames, expand acronyms, strip internal taxonomy, read-aloud test). Lead with outcomes; concrete over abstract; no mechanism narration.

plugins.name: sulis-platform-sdk
plugins.description: Platform SDK — build production-ready SaaS backends with built-in auth, billing, multi-tenancy, and observability

plugins.name: sea
plugins.description: Senior Engineering Architect — designs hardened architectures, audits brownfield code for primitive gaps, and decomposes designs into atomic Work Packages with Red-Green-Blue verification. /sea:probe v0.9.0 uses a Python orchestrator (scripts/probe.py) to invoke ast-grep + lizard + scc + git plus optional tools (jscpd, ts-prune, vulture, deadcode, dependency-cruiser, import-linter, detect-secrets) across 17 deterministic phases — 15 per-workspace + 2 repo-wide (Deployment Topology with first-class Sulis manifest support, Credential Scanning hash-only / baseline-aware). Polyglot 4-stage workspace enumeration adds auxiliary packages, code-bearing dirs, and deployment-only dirs alongside the existing monorepo manifests. Outputs structured JSON + Markdown + a self-contained navigable HTML report. 88+ unit + integration tests; no LLM fallback. Every WP carries a change primitive (22-primitive Minto-pyramid catalogue). v0.11.6: cites Founder English (FE-01..FE-10) at plugins/srd/references/founder-english.md — every founder-facing chat message AND founder-readable artifact write passes the FE-06 five-point check (strip internal IDs, translate filenames, expand acronyms, strip internal taxonomy, read-aloud test). Lead with outcomes; concrete over abstract; no mechanism narration.

plugins.name: sulis-security
plugins.description: Security & Viability Reviewer — runs a 25-primitive codebase viability assessment (security, data protection, code quality, supply chain, infrastructure) via an OODA-spiral methodology. Composes with SEA for hardening and with SRD for requirements-traceable findings. v0.3.2: cites Founder English (FE-01..FE-10) at plugins/srd/references/founder-english.md — every founder-facing chat message AND founder-readable artifact write passes the FE-06 five-point check (strip internal IDs, translate filenames, expand acronyms, strip internal taxonomy, read-aloud test). Lead with outcomes; concrete over abstract; no mechanism narration.

plugins.name: idc
plugins.description: Investor Deck Coach — facilitates Sequoia-style pitch deck creation through guided conversation. Stage-aware (angel, pre-seed, seed, Series A, Series B). Produces evidence-backed market research, rigorous financial modelling, adversarial review, customer-branded PowerPoint + HTML decks, Excel + HTML financial models, and a live rehearsal drill. v0.3.2: cites Founder English (FE-01..FE-10) at plugins/srd/references/founder-english.md — every founder-facing chat message AND founder-readable artifact write passes the FE-06 five-point check (strip internal IDs, translate filenames, expand acronyms, strip internal taxonomy, read-aloud test). Lead with outcomes; concrete over abstract; no mechanism narration.

plugins.name: sulis-execution
plugins.description: Work Package Executor — three-layer architecture (per v0.9.0) plus plan-mode-style Step 1.5 plan generation (v0.10.0+). v0.10.6 fixes a false-positive in _detect_branch_ci: the v0.10.4 substring-grep heuristic matched any Conventional Commits prefix anywhere in a workflow YAML — including paths-ignore filters. A real deploy-on-push-to-dev workflow with `paths-ignore: ['docs/**']` was misclassified as branch CI (because `docs/` matched the substring), causing wpx-pipeline to poll for 45 min waiting for check-runs that never appeared. Replaced with a structural parser that walks each .github/workflows/*.y[a]ml file looking specifically for `branches:` declarations (under on.push or on.pull_request), parsing inline lists and block lists. Explicitly rejects `branches-ignore`, `paths`, `paths-ignore`, `tags`, and comments. Two new regression tests pinned: paths-ignore must not register; branches-ignore must not register. v0.10.5 shipped the pytest test suite + two bug fixes (already-merged branch detection + multi-table INDEX parsing). v0.10.4 fixed emit_ok exit_code + no-branch-CI hang. v0.10.3 closed the auto-draft INDEX-registration gap. v0.10.2 fixed wpx-step12 dispatcher correctness. v0.10.1 fixed wpx-* tool discoverability. 43 tests across unit/ + integration/. Composes with CP-01..CP-05, AAF-01..AAF-09, EP-02/03/07, RGB-01..03. v0.10.7: wpx-pipeline's Step 10a health check now auto-detects the health path from --smoke-cmd's URL (e.g. `curl -sf https://staging/health` → /health), with --health-path flag for explicit override. Fixes the bug where APIs whose root returns 404 by design (health only at /health) produced spurious 10-minute hangs followed by health_status: unhealthy BLOCKERs. Backward-compatible: falls back to / when no URL is in the smoke command. Three regression tests pinned (49 tests total).

plugins.name: sulis-concierge
plugins.description: Founder Concierge — the single entry point for non-technical founders building a product through the Sulis AI marketplace. Orchestrates the journey from idea → requirements → design → implementation → verification → security in plain English. Spawns specialist agents (SRD, SEA, sulis-security, sulis-context, sulis-execution) at the right time, reads their produced artifacts, translates technical output into founder English, maintains journey state across sessions in .concierge/{project}/JOURNEY.md. Applies AAF-01..AAF-09 aggressively at every founder-facing message. Start a session with `claude --agent sulis-concierge`. v0.1.6: cites Founder English (FE-01..FE-10) at plugins/srd/references/founder-english.md — every founder-facing chat message AND founder-readable artifact write passes the FE-06 five-point check (strip internal IDs, translate filenames, expand acronyms, strip internal taxonomy, read-aloud test). Lead with outcomes; concrete over abstract; no mechanism narration.
